title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India

jsonLd.title: Principal Radiologist at Becton Dickinson India
jsonLd.description:
Becton Dickinson India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Radiologist for our Faridabad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Becton Dickinson India:
Becton Dickinson India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Becton Dickinson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
